title: Barren Lands
description:
Almost only generating Badlands biomes! 
Creating a barren lands feel.
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6da8d1b418bd284effb924fdfc9178c4c28fae38_0.webp)

Welcome to Barren Lands, an immersive Minecraft datapack that transforms your world into a stunning, desolate landscape inspired by the rugged beauty of the Badlands biome. In this stark and unforgiving environment.

**Key Features:**

- **Exclusive Badlands Generation**: Experience a world solely made up of Badlands biomes, characterized by their striking mesas, colorful clay deposits, and dramatic cliffs. 
Barren Lands features a diverse yet stark array of biomes to explore, each with an increased size of 6, ensuring expansive and immersive environments:

>**Enabled Biomes**:

- > **Deserts**: Traverse expansive desert areas, complete with sandy dunes and the occasional oasis, adding to the survival challenge.

- > **All Badlands Biomes**: Experience the full spectrum of Badlands terrains, from vibrant mesas to colorful clay deposits and towering cliffs, now more prominent than ever.
  
- > **All Oceans**: Discover the mysteries of vast oceans, teeming with aquatic life and hidden treasures beneath the waves.

- > **Stony Peaks**: Navigate rugged, rocky elevations that provide breathtaking views and unique challenges for adventurers.

- > **Cliffs**: Explore dramatic cliffs that create natural barriers and pathways, perfect for daring explorers.

- > **Stony Shores**: Find unique coastal landscapes where the land meets the sea, offering a variety of resources and scenic vistas.

- > **Cave Biomes**: Delve into rich underground cave systems filled with unique flora and fauna, providing ample opportunities for exploration and resource gathering.

- > **Deep Dark**: Venture into the eerie Deep Dark biome, where shadows loom and danger awaits, home to rare resources and formidable foes.

**Unique Structures**:

The Barren Lands features vanilla structures, enhancing your exploration and adventure:

> - **Abandoned Mineshafts**: Discover extensive networks of mineshafts hidden within the cliffs, filled with precious resources and the remnants of miners who once toiled there.

> - **Desert Temples**: Uncover ancient desert temples, offering hidden treasures and traps, rewarding the brave who dare to explore their depths.

> - **Villages**: Encounter villages with unique architecture that blend seamlessly into the Badlands environment, providing trade opportunities and quests.

> - **Strongholds**: Find hidden strongholds beneath the surface, containing valuable loot and the secrets of the End dimension.

> - **Ancient Cities**: Explore the remnants of ancient cities in the Deep Dark, filled with mystery, powerful loot, and lurking dangers.

> - **Ruins**: Discover other vanilla structures, such as wells and igloos, that dot the landscape, each offering unique treasures and challenges.
 
- **Amplified Ore Generation**: Unearth a wealth of resources with amplified ore spawns unique to the Barren Lands. Players will encounter an abundance of valuable ores, including enhanced quantities of gold, copper, and rare gems, encouraging strategic mining and exploration in this harsh environment.
 
- **Sparse Vegetation and Wildlife**: Embrace the barrenness as you encounter limited vegetation, such as cacti and dry shrubs, alongside specially designed fauna that thrive in this arid landscape, adding to the realism of the ecosystem.
 
- **Survival Challenges**: The scarcity of resources means players must adapt their survival strategies. Find innovative ways to create shelter and obtain food while facing the unique challenges of the Barren Lands.

**Installation Instructions**
To install the Barren Lands datapack, simply download the .zip file and place it into the datapacks folder of your Minecraft world. Ensure you’re using a compatible version of Minecraft for the best experience.

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
